rationale: The citing article is an editorial content-coding review of 401 JMR papers from 2013–2019, and the cited 2019 Kickstarter paper is likely just one coded article/example within its topic mapping (e.g., emerging prosocial behavior), not a theory/method source it builds on. The matched evidence is only a single DOI reference entry with no in-text context, and the citing note’s stated prior-work anchors are other journal-review papers (Huber et al. 2014; Tellis et al. 1999; Johnson 2006), not this study.
